nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers daily at 7:00 AM to check for auctions with Surplus List data ready for processing.

nodes.name: Get Auctions with Surplus List
nodes.notes: Queries Airtable for auctions that have a Surplus List but don't have any Foreclosures created yet.

nodes.name: Process Each Auction
nodes.notes: Processes each auction that has a Surplus List but no Foreclosures yet. Prepares the data for downstream processing.

nodes.name: Workflow Complete

parameters.description: End of the workflow. In a complete implementation, this would be replaced with various downstream processes for processing the Surplus List.

nodes.notes: Placeholder node for the end of the workflow. In a production implementation, this would be replaced with nodes that process the Surplus List attachment, potentially extracting data and creating related records.
